commodities.name: Food & Water
commodities.description: Essential consumables required by all inhabited systems.

commodities.name: Textiles
commodities.description: Fabrics and clothing materials for civilian populations.

commodities.name: Common Metals
commodities.description: Iron, copper, and aluminum for basic construction and manufacturing.

commodities.name: Fuel Cells
commodities.description: Hydrogen fuel cells used by spacecraft for jump travel.

commodities.name: Machinery
commodities.description: Manufacturing equipment and industrial tools.

commodities.name: Electronics
commodities.description: Computer components, sensors, and communication equipment.

commodities.name: Rare Metals
commodities.description: Platinum, titanium, and rare earth elements for advanced manufacturing.

commodities.name: Manufactured Goods
commodities.description: Consumer products, tools, and household items.

commodities.name: Precious Metals
commodities.description: Gold, silver, and platinum for jewelry and investment.

commodities.name: Art & Antiquities
commodities.description: Cultural artifacts, paintings, and historical items of great value.

commodities.name: Exotic Goods
commodities.description: Rare alien artifacts, exotic specimens, and unique curiosities.
commodities.description_note: Extremely volatile but potentially very profitable.

commodities.name: Medical Supplies
commodities.description: Advanced pharmaceuticals, medical equipment, and bio-tech products.

commodities.name: Raw Ore
commodities.description: Unrefined ore extracted from asteroids. Low value but abundant.

commodities.name: Iron Ore
commodities.description: Iron-rich ore mined from asteroid fields. Essential for smelting.

commodities.name: Crystal Ore
commodities.description: Crystalline mineral deposits with unique refractive properties. Used in advanced optics and electronics.

commodities.name: Rare Ore
commodities.description: Exceptionally scarce mineral deposits containing trace amounts of exotic elements.

commodities.name: Scrap Metal
commodities.description: Salvaged metal fragments from derelict ships and stations.

commodities.name: Salvaged Electronics
commodities.description: Recovered circuit boards, processors, and electronic components from salvage operations.

commodities.name: Rare Parts
commodities.description: Hard-to-find mechanical and electronic components salvaged from advanced wreckage.

commodities.name: Alloy Composite
commodities.description: High-strength metal alloy combining common and rare metals. Used in advanced ship construction.

commodities.name: Purified Crystal
commodities.description: Ultra-refined crystalline material with precise molecular structure. Essential for advanced optics and energy systems.

commodities.name: Weapons Components
commodities.description: Military-grade weapon parts and targeting systems. Trade restricted by most factions.

commodities.name: Restricted Tech
commodities.description: Dual-use advanced technology with military applications. Requires permits to trade legally.

commodities.name: Stolen Data
commodities.description: Encrypted corporate secrets, stolen research, and intelligence files. Illegal everywhere except lawless zones.

commodities.name: Combat Stimulants
commodities.description: Performance-enhancing compounds banned by all faction medical boards. High demand in frontier zones.

commodities.name: Diverted Medicine
commodities.description: Legitimate medical supplies diverted from Guild-controlled supply chains. Cheaper than official channels.

commodities.name: Encrypted Data Chip
commodities.description: A military-grade encrypted data chip intercepted by Dex Halloran. Contains information about organized convoy raids.
